belegtyp.label: Belegtyp
belegtyp.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

upload_datum.label: Upload-Datum
upload_datum.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

beleg_bemerkung.label: Bemerkungen zum Beleg
beleg_bemerkung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

beleg_datei.label: Beleg-Datei (PDF / JPG / PNG)
beleg_datei.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69d8fae8666f4fa5ddd1a8b6/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

belegpositionen_uebersicht.label: Belegpositionen
belegpositionen_uebersicht.description:

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69d8fae8bbe0c2d0fb5178fa/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).
